g.aria-label: Bird15 points, minimum X 35, maximum X 65, minimum Y 0.9, maximum Y 2.6, 1 of 4 series. To navigate the list of series, use the arrow keys to move between series in list order, use Enter to move into the list of points for that series, use Shift + Enter to return to the chart information.
LargeMammal15 points, minimum X 160, maximum X 360, minimum Y 90, maximum Y 300, 2 of 4 series.
Reptile15 points, minimum X 80, maximum X 160, minimum Y 4, maximum Y 16, 3 of 4 series.
Rodent15 points, minimum X 18, maximum X 35, minimum Y 0.25, maximum Y 0.8, 4 of 4 series. End of list order.

Animal Sizes with 4 series and 60 total points, overall minimum X 18, overall maximum X 360, overall minimum Y 0.25, overall maximum Y 300. To navigate the chart, use Enter to move into the list of series or use the arrow keys to navigate the chart information.

rect.aria-label: X axis shows Body Length and ranges from 0 to 400
Y axis shows Weight (kg) and ranges from 0 to 350
Legend shows AnimalType and has values Bird, LargeMammal, Reptile, and Rodent
